title: TMX start-up imminent || High Mexico refinery runs boost Panamaxes
section_path: TMX start-up imminent || High Mexico refinery runs boost Panamaxes
section_path_text: TMX start-up imminent || High Mexico refinery runs boost Panamaxes
summary:
Main
This week, in the East, we discuss the imminent startup of the TMX pipeline and . what it could mean for Canadian crude exports to Asia. On the clean side, we look at why MR earnings in the Pacific are robust.
